name: Kenya Power and Lighting Company
description: Kenya's national electricity distribution company responsible for transmission, distribution and retail sale of electricity across Kenya's 47 counties.

name: Kenya Airways Limited
description: Kenya's national carrier and Africa's 4th largest airline operating across Africa, Europe, Asia and the Americas, with Jomo Kenyatta International Airport as its hub.

name: Kenya Ports Authority (KPA)
description: State corporation responsible for the management and operation of all scheduled seaport services in Kenya, including the Port of Mombasa — East Africa's largest port.

name: Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA)
description: Kenya Revenue Authority is the national tax collection agency responsible for assessment, collection and accounting of all revenues due to the Government of Kenya.

name: Kenya Development Bank Limited
description: Kenya Development Bank provides medium and long-term development finance to support Kenya's economic transformation agenda under the Big Four and Bottom-Up Economic Transformation Agenda.

name: National Social Security Fund (NSSF)
description: Kenya's national social security fund providing retirement benefits, invalidity, survivors and employment injury benefits to workers in both formal and informal sectors.
